channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Government Intervention Over Jimmy Kimmel's Jokes Is Controversial
item.description: While the comedian's remarks about Melania Trump were crude, federal oversight of late-night monologues remains contentious.

item.title: Trump Cites British Monarch on Shared Iran Nuclear Stance
item.description: President Trump noted Tuesday that King Charles III supports efforts to stop Tehran from acquiring nuclear capabilities.

item.title: Rep. Gill Questions Abortion Procedure Expert at House Hearing
item.description: Texas Republican Brandon Grill faced a pro-choice witness Tuesday regarding abortion procedures during the subcommittee's hearing on clinic access.

item.title: Sympathy Versus Facts in the Film 'I Swear'
item.description: A biographical drama explores the tension between emotional resonance and factual accuracy.
